stories.title: Golden Knights sweep the Avalanche: Grades, big qu...
stories.summary: Vegas is off to the Cup Final, while the Avs are back to the drawing board. Here's how it all went down.

stories.title: Chiefs' Kelce joining Guardians ownership group
stories.summary: Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce is joining the Guardians' ownership group as a minority investor, he told ESPN, purchasing a stake in the team he grew up watching.

stories.title: Bednar: Avalanche ran 'into a buzz saw in Vegas'
stories.summary: The Avalanche head into a long offseason after the Presidents' Trophy winners were swept out of the Western Conference finals by the Golden Knights.

stories.title: Thunder use balanced attack to take series lead
stories.summary: The Thunder rode another great game from their role players to a decisive 127-114 win over the Spurs to take a 3-2 series lead.

stories.title: Spurs: Urgency to get Wemby going after off-night
stories.summary: After Victor Wembanyama was held to 20 points in the Spurs' loss to the Thunder on Tuesday night, coach Mitch Johnson said "we're going to need to" get him going if San Antonio is to stave off elimination in Game 6.
